mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.user_id AS userId, t.order_id AS orderId, t.symbol_id AS symbolId, t.side, t.quantity, t.price, t.amount, COALESCE(t.executed_at, t.created_at) AS createdAt, s.code, s.name FROM trades t JOIN symbols s ON s.id = t.symbol_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY COALESCE(t.executed_at, t.created_at) DESC, t.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.id, t.user_id AS userId, t.order_id AS orderId, t.symbol_id AS symbolId, t.side, t.quantity, t.price, t.amount, COALESCE(t.executed_at, t.created_at) AS createdAt, s.code, s.name FROM trades t JOIN symbols s ON s.id = t.symbol_id WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
